name_cn:
Dior❤️ Toujours Handbag [Medium Pink]
This Dior Toujours handbag debuted at the Spring/Summer 2023 show, featuring a unique casual and practical design. Crafted from black calfskin, it is detailed with oversized houndstooth quilting. The spacious interior features a pocket for neatly organizing daily essentials. It features a CD Lock letter D turn-lock closure and adjustable sides to elevate the style. The leather handle has adjustable details for easy carrying.
CD Lock and strap closure
Dior charm
Removable inner pocket
Adjustable leather handle
Includes dust bag
Model: 2821
Dimensions: 28.5x19x21.5cm
